name: Refusal-Gated Decoding: Preserving Refusal Behavior Under High-Temperature Sampling
summary: arXiv:2607.20791v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: High-temperature sampling is one of the primary mechanisms for increasing diversity in LLMs. Recent advances in truncation-based sampling techniques...
description: arXiv:2607.20791v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: High-temperature sampling is one of the primary mechanisms for increasing diversity in LLMs. Recent advances in truncation-based sampling techniques have helped mitigate drawbacks of high-temperature sampling such as neural text degeneration, thereby enabling greater diversity in LLM outputs without sacrificing coherence. However, increasing the e...
author: Phillip Howard, Xin Su, Allen Roush, Manikandan Ravikiran, Amir Abdullah
